tagline: Jump Right In - Bring Your Dream Pool to Life!

hero.headline:
Your Dream Pool, Built by
Hands That Care
hero.subheadline: For 18+ years, owner Eric Larsen has personally guided every custom pool project from first sketch to final splash. No sales reps, no runaround — just an award-winning builder who treats your home like his own.

services.label: What We Build
services.headline: Custom Pools & Outdoor Living<br class="hidden md:block">Designed Around Your Life
services.subtitle: From shotcrete pools that last a lifetime to fire features that light up your evenings, we handle every detail so you can focus on the fun part.

cards.title: Custom Pool Construction
cards.description: Shotcrete pools designed for strength, beauty, and your lifestyle — custom shapes, integrated spas, sun shelves, and tanning ledges built to last.

cards.title: Pool Renovations
cards.description: Breathe new life into your aging pool with modern finishes, upgraded equipment, and enhanced features that make it feel brand new again.

cards.title: Water & Fire Features
cards.description: Waterfalls, fountains, fire bowls, and fire walls that transform your backyard into a resort-worthy retreat with dramatic ambiance.

cards.title: 3D Design Visualization
cards.description: See your dream pool in stunning 3D before construction begins. Every detail refined until it matches your vision perfectly.

cards.title: Outdoor Living Spaces
cards.description: Complete outdoor kitchens and living areas that complement your pool, creating a cohesive backyard paradise for entertaining year-round.

cards.title: Energy-Efficient Equipment
cards.description: Modern pumps, heaters, and automation systems that cut operating costs while keeping your pool running at peak performance.

how_it_works.headline: From Dream to Dive in Three Steps

steps.title: Design Consultation
steps.description: Meet with owner Eric Larsen to walk your property and talk about your vision. You'll receive a custom 3D design and transparent line-item pricing — no hidden fees, no pressure.

steps.title: We Build It Right
steps.description: Our award-winning crew brings your design to life with shotcrete construction, clear communication at every stage, and a six-stage payment schedule that protects you financially.

steps.title: Jump Right In
steps.description: Your custom pool is complete, backed by one of the strongest warranties in the industry. Eric and the team remain a phone call away for anything you need — today and years from now.

about.label: Why Tampa Bay Trusts Us
about.headline: Built on the Golden Rule — Every Pool, Every Client
about.description: For over 18 years, Eric Larsen has been building custom pools throughout the Greater Tampa Bay Area. He started in the industry at a young age, working his way through every role from service and repairs to design and construction. That hands-on experience means nothing gets overlooked. Eric stays directly involved and personally accessible on every project — because treating clients the way he'd want to be treated isn't just a slogan, it's how the company was built.

features.title: Owner-Led, Every Project
features.description: Eric Larsen remains personally involved and accessible from design through completion. You always know who's in charge.

features.title: Line-Item Pricing Transparency
features.description: A six-stage draw schedule and detailed line-item pricing so you know exactly where every dollar goes. No surprises.

features.title: Industry-Leading Warranty
features.description: One of the strongest warranty packages in the pool industry, because we stand behind every pool we build — long after the last tile is set.

pricing.headline: Transparent Pricing. No Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Every proposal includes line-item pricing and a six-stage payment schedule. You see exactly what you're paying for — before we break ground.

guarantee.headline: Our "Golden Rule" Guarantee
guarantee.description: We treat your project the way we'd want ours treated. If any detail doesn't meet the standard we promised, we make it right — no excuses, no extra charges. That commitment is backed by one of the strongest warranty packages in the industry and 18 years of award-winning craftsmanship.

faqs.question: How long does a custom pool build take?
faqs.answer: Most custom pool projects take 8-12 weeks from permit to completion, depending on design complexity and permitting timelines. Eric will give you a realistic schedule during your consultation and keep you updated at every stage.

faqs.question: Do I get to see my pool design before construction?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We create detailed 3D renderings so you can see exactly what your pool will look like from every angle. We refine the design until you're completely satisfied before any construction begins.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve?
faqs.answer: We build custom pools throughout Pinellas County, Hillsborough County, Pasco County, Northern Manatee County, and Southern Hernando County — the entire Greater Tampa Bay Area.

faqs.question: How does the payment schedule work?
faqs.answer: We use a six-stage draw schedule tied to construction milestones. You only pay as work is completed, giving you financial transparency and protection throughout the entire build process.

faqs.question: What kind of warranty do you offer?
faqs.answer: We offer one of the strongest warranty packages in the pool industry. Eric will walk you through every detail during your consultation so you know exactly what's covered and for how long.

testimonials.name: Beth Ann K.
testimonials.text: We are extremely happy with our pool and kitchen build from design to completion. The team was professional, kept the site clean, communicated well and delivered a quality product.

testimonials.name: Richard D.
testimonials.text: The Larsen team from design to installation to post installation support were great to work with. Project went on time with no surprises.

testimonials.name: Lori P.
testimonials.text: The owner of Larsen's Pool and Spa, Eric, is exceptionally knowledgeable and consistently goes above and beyond to help customers!
